heading: Authorizations for appropriations
label: 713d–3 Authorizations for appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated such amounts as may be necessary for purposes of carrying out the provisions of this joint resolution.
notes: References in TextThis joint resolution, referred to in text, means , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Dec. 30, 1947, ch. 52661 Stat. 945
CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 1919 of the former Appendix to Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
